design_title: Cosmic Ascension: Where Steel Dreams Become Weightless Wonder
svg_code:
<svg viewBox="0 0 640 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <style>
      @keyframes d07-float {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-15px); }
      }
      @keyframes d07-sway {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0px); }
        50% { transform: translateX(8px); }
      }
      @keyframes d07-pulse {
        0%, 100% { opacity: 0.85; }
        50% { opacity: 1; }
      }
      @keyframes d07-spin-slow {
        0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
        100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
      }
      .d07-bg { fill: #1A1A2E; }
      .d07-float-1 { animation: d07-float 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .d07-float-2 { animation: d07-float 3.6s ease-in-out 0.3s infinite; }
      .d07-float-3 { animation: d07-float 4.2s ease-in-out 0.6s infinite; }
      .d07-float-4 { animation: d07-float 3.8s ease-in-out 0.9s infinite; }
      .d07-float-5 { animation: d07-float 4.4s ease-in-out 1.2s infinite; }
      .d07-float-6 { animation: d07-float 3.3s ease-in-out 1.5s infinite; }
      .d07-sway-1 { animation: d07-sway 4s ease-in-out 0.2s infinite; }
      .d07-sway-2 { animation: d07-sway 5s ease-in-out 0.5s infinite; }
      .d07-sway-3 { animation: d07-sway 4.5s ease-in-out 0.8s infinite; }
      .d07-pulse-1 { animation: d07-pulse 2.5s ease-in-out 0.4s infinite; }
      .d07-pulse-2 { animation: d07-pulse 2.8s ease-in-out 1s infinite; }
      .d07-pulse-3 { animation: d07-pulse 3s ease-in-out 1.6s infinite; }
    </style>
    
    <radialGradient id="d07-balloon-red" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FF6B7A;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#E63946;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C1121F;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d07-balloon-blue" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#6BA3D4;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#457B9D;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#2D5A7B;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d07-balloon-gold" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FFB84D;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#F4A261;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#E8860D;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d07-balloon-teal" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#52B8A8;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#2A9D8F;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#1A7F7E;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d07-balloon-purple" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#B088F0;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#9B5DE5;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#7209B7;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d07-balloon-orange" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FB9C3F;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#F77F00;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#D66600;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <filter id="d07-glow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="coloredBlur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect class="d07-bg" width="640" height="200"/>
  
  <!-- Floating sparkles -->
  <circle cx="580" cy="30" r="2" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.6" class="d07-float-6 d07-pulse-1"/>
  <circle cx="120" cy="40" r="1.5" fill="#2A9D8F" opacity="0.5" class="d07-float-5 d07-pulse-2"/>
  <circle cx="520" cy="170" r="1.8" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.6" class="d07-float-4 d07-pulse-3"/>
  
  <!-- Central transformation zone: Left side (Rocket) fading to Right side (Balloons) -->
  
  <!-- Rocket booster (left, metallic theme transitioning) -->
  <g class="d07-float-1 d07-sway-1">
    <!-- Bottom booster stage -->
    <path d="M 80 140 L 75 175 L 85 175 L 80 140" fill="#457B9D" opacity="0.7"/>
    <path d="M 95 140 L 90 175 L 100 175 L 95 140" fill="#457B9D" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- Main rocket body (metallic tube) -->
    <rect x="75" y="60" width="20" height="85" fill="#9B9B9B" opacity="0.8" rx="2"/>
    <!-- Gradient highlight -->
    <rect x="75" y="60" width="3" height="85" fill="#E8E8E8" opacity="0.6"/>
    <!-- Rocket nose cone -->
    <polygon points="85,45 80,60 90,60" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.8"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Launch flame (transitioning effect) -->
  <g class="d07-float-2" opacity="0.5">
    <path d="M 78 160 Q 75 175 80 185" stroke="#F77F00" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M 92 160 Q 95 175 90 185" stroke="#F77F00" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- BALLOON CLUSTER CENTER-RIGHT -->
  
  <!-- Balloon 1 (Large red, primary) -->
  <g class="d07-float-1 d07-sway-1">
    <circle cx="200" cy="70" r="35" fill="url(#d07-balloon-red)" filter="url(#d07-glow)"/>
    <ellipse cx="215" cy="55" rx="12" ry="16" fill="white" opacity="0.35"/>
    <!-- String -->
    <line x1="200" y1="105" x2="200" y2="160" stroke="#999" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Balloon 2 (Blue, upper-right) -->
  <g class="d07-float-2 d07-sway-2">
    <circle cx="280" cy="50" r="32" fill="url(#d07-balloon-blue)" filter="url(#d07-glow)"/>
    <ellipse cx="293" cy="38" rx="11" ry="14" fill="white" opacity="0.38"/>
    <!-- String -->
    <line x1="280" y1="82" x2="280" y2="160" stroke="#888" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Balloon 3 (Gold/orange, left cluster) -->
  <g class="d07-float-3 d07-sway-3">
    <circle cx="240" cy="100" r="30" fill="url(#d07-balloon-gold)" filter="url(#d07-glow)"/>
    <ellipse cx="252" cy="88" rx="10" ry="13" fill="white" opacity="0.32"/>
    <!-- String -->
    <line x1="240" y1="130" x2="240" y2="165" stroke="#777" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Balloon 4 (Teal, lower cluster) -->
  <g class="d07-float-4 d07-sway-1">
    <circle cx="310" cy="120" r="28" fill="url(#d07-balloon-teal)" filter="url(#d07-glow)"/>
    <ellipse cx="321" cy="110" rx="9" ry="12" fill="white" opacity="0.36"/>
    <!-- String -->
    <line x1="310" y1="148" x2="310" y2="175" stroke="#666" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Balloon 5 (Purple, right side) -->
  <g class="d07-float-5 d07-sway-2">
    <circle cx="360" cy="80" r="29" fill="url(#d07-balloon-purple)" filter="url(#d07-glow)"/>
    <ellipse cx="372" cy="69" rx="10" ry="13" fill="white" opacity="0.34"/>
    <!-- String -->
    <line x1="360" y1="109" x2="360" y2="168" stroke="#777" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.35"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Balloon 6 (Orange, far right) -->
  <g class="d07-float-6 d07-sway-3">
    <circle cx="410" cy="110" r="26" fill="url(#d07-balloon-orange)" filter="url(#d07-glow)"/>
    <ellipse cx="420" cy="100" rx="9" ry="11" fill="white" opacity="0.38"/>
    <!-- String -->
    <line x1="410" y1="136" x2="410" y2="170" stroke="#666" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.25"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Scattered confetti-like elements (celebration) -->
  <circle cx="450" cy="35" r="3" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.6" class="d07-float-3 d07-pulse-1"/>
  <circle cx="500" cy="60" r="2.5" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.5" class="d07-float-4 d07-pulse-2"/>
  <circle cx="470" cy="90" r="2" fill="#2A9D8F" opacity="0.4" class="d07-float-5 d07-pulse-3"/>
  <circle cx="530" cy="45" r="2.2" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.55" class="d07-float-6 d07-pulse-1"/>
  
  <!-- Negative space: Pure empty areas on right edge -->
  <!-- (Intentionally left as dark background for breathing room) -->
  
  <!-- Subtle connection gradient from rocket to balloons -->
  <ellipse cx="150" cy="100" rx="40" ry="50" fill="url(#d07-balloon-red)" opacity="0.08" filter="url(#d07-glow)"/>
  
</svg>
description: A steel sentinel transforms into weightless joy—where rocket precision melts into buoyant celebration, each balloon dancing with staggered grace as launch flames become ethereal strings connecting earth to sky.
